_comment: HTTP-mode manifest for hosted Forge deployments. Run the container with SLACK_SOCKET_MODE=false and SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET set. Endpoints are served by ExpressReceiver: POST /slack/events, GET /health. Socket-mode manifest.json is for local `slack run` / `npm run slack`.

display_information.name: Forge
display_information.description: Turn Slack context into schema-validated PDFs with DocForge.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Ship draft, proposal, incident, board, and status PDFs from Slack context.

suggested_prompts.title: Draft PDF
suggested_prompts.message: draft turn these notes into a PDF

suggested_prompts.message: board pack for Q3 operating review
